name: NSP Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Pre-matric scholarship for Scheduled Caste students studying in Classes 9 and 10.

name: NSP Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Post-matric scholarship covering tuition, maintenance, and other charges for SC students pursuing higher education.

name: NSP Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Post-matric scholarship for Other Backward Class students who have passed class 10.

name: NSP Post-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: For Scheduled Tribe students pursuing post-matric studies, covering tuition and maintenance.

name: PM YASASVI Scholarship
description: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India — for top OBC/EWS students.

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Minority Communities
description: Scholarship for students from minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Parsi, Jain) studying in Classes 1 to 10.

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Minority Communities
description: For minority community students pursuing education beyond Class 10 at recognised institutions.

name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship
description: For meritorious girls from minority communities studying in Classes 9 to 12.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE)
description: For students in the top 1% of Class 12 board exams pursuing BSc or integrated MSc in natural sciences.

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
ministry: All India Council for Technical Education
description: For girl students pursuing technical courses (Degree or Diploma) from AICTE-approved institutions.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for Specially Abled Students
ministry: All India Council for Technical Education
description: For differently-abled students pursuing technical education at AICTE-approved institutions.

name: Scholarship for Top Class Education for Students with Disability
ministry: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
description: Full scholarship for PwD students admitted to premier institutions for UG and PG programmes.

name: Ishan Uday Scholarship for North-East Region
description: For students originating from the North-East region pursuing UG and PG courses at recognised institutions.

name: UGC PG Indira Gandhi Scholarship for Single Girl Child
description: For single girl child (only child in family or one of twins/triplets) pursuing PG studies at UGC-recognised universities.

name: Mukhyamantri Ucch Shiksha Scholarship — Rajasthan
description: For Rajasthan-domicile students who have scored ≥60% in Class 12 and belong to economically weaker sections.

name: Maharashtra EBC Freeship Scheme
ministry: Maharashtra Social Justice & Special Assistance Dept.
description: Complete tuition fee exemption for Economically Backward Class students from Maharashtra pursuing higher education.

name: Vidyasiri Scholarship — Karnataka
description: For SC/ST/OBC students from Karnataka pursuing UG/PG technical and professional courses.

name: Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship — West Bengal
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship for West Bengal students in UG/PG programmes, covering all caste categories.

name: PM-USHA (Universities for Holistic Advancement) Scholarship
description: Scholarships under PM-USHA for meritorious students in state universities across India.

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships (CSSS)
description: For meritorious students from families with annual income below ₹8 lakh who secured above 80th percentile in Class 12 board.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMSS)
description: For meritorious students from economically weaker sections to arrest dropout at Class 8, continuing up to Class 12.

name: Tamil Nadu Science Scholar Award for Girls
description: For girl students from Tamil Nadu pursuing science streams at UG level with distinction in Class 12.
